name: BINSWANGER DISEASE
dominant_finding: focal areas of increased signal intensity on T2WI (= "unidentified bright objects")
distribution: multifocal hypodense lesions (periventricular, centrum semiovale) with sparing of U fibers
discriminating_features: multifocal hypodense lesions (periventricular, centrum semiovale) with sparing of U fibers
sulcal enlargement + dilated lateral ventricles (brain atrophy)
focal areas of increased signal intensity on T2WI (= "unidentified bright objects")
